title: Audit the design doc against the live shared-ref implementation and enumerate every remaining gap
summary: Produce the canonical closure inventory by comparing PRISM_SHARED_COORDINATION_REFS.md against the code on origin/main, explicitly calling out what already landed, what is only partially implemented, what is still design-only, and which daily developer pain points each missing piece still causes.

acceptance.label: There is one authoritative gap list that maps each missing design promise to concrete code surfaces and user-facing impact.
The plan can be executed without guessing whether a gap is already live or only documented.
